name: Chicken Barbecue, Thai-Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into one-inch cubes.
2. Marinate chicken in the next 8 ingredients overnight.
3. Skewer approximately 1 ounce of chicken and intersperse with cubed pineapple and green pepper.
4. Cook chicken over an open grill until done.
5. To prepare dipping sauce, mix remaining ingredients well.
6. Serve with chicken.
